summary: Iteration 18 validated the i18n cleanup for Miro.Care. Backend regression passed (health, admin login, TTS male+en/female+en, translations keys). i18n frontend testing PASSED for /booking (ru/en/zh/ar — localized legend, weekdays, price unit, TZ label), /payment-success fallback (en/zh/ar — localized paymentError copy, no Russian leak), and RTL (document.documentElement.dir correctly 'rtl' for ar). One bug found & fixed by tester: Chinese translation block was missing errorTryAgain/bookingFailed keys. One CRITICAL blocker: /api/chat returns HTTP 500 because OpenRouter account has insufficient credits (402) — breaks chat/greeting/image-analysis end-to-end. Cannot validate chat-greeting language or mid-chat agent switching until credits restored. No code bug in chat.py — this is a billing/infra issue.

critical.issue: Returns 500 — upstream OpenRouter responds 402 'Insufficient credits. Add more using https://openrouter.ai/settings/credits'. Blocks chat, greeting generation, and image analysis.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing keys errorTryAgain and bookingFailed for Chinese — fallback would leak Russian. Tester added them.

integration_issues.flow: Chat greeting pre-cache in selected language
integration_issues.issue: Cannot verify end-to-end because /api/chat is down (OpenRouter 402). Frontend code is correct (pre-cache uses current lang), but functional validation is blocked.

issues: In zh UI, price strip label 'Advance: 50% ($100)' remains in English — pre-existing partial-localization (not in iter18 scope, flag for backlog).
Miron's bio block ('Диетолог, нутрициолог…') is hardcoded Russian and does not change with language. App.css is LOCKED per instructions; flagging as known limitation only.

action_items: CRITICAL: Top up OpenRouter credits or rotate OPENROUTER_API_KEY / switch model. /api/chat 500s block the whole AI flow and all its regression tests.

After chat is restored, re-run end-to-end frontend tests for: greeting shown in selected language, mid-chat agent switch → fresh greeting in selected language, localized error bubble when API fails (t('errorTryAgain')).
Consider localizing 'Advance:' prefix on BookingCalendar price strip (currently English-only).
critical_code_review_comments: translations-extra.js: Chinese (zh) block omitted errorTryAgain + bookingFailed that were added for the other 7 languages — classic copy-paste miss. Fixed by tester. Recommend a unit test or TS type that enforces all 8 langs have identical key sets.
PaymentSuccess.jsx fallbacks correctly use t('paymentError')/t('goToChat') — verified visually in en/zh/ar.
BookingCalendar.jsx getMonthName / getWeekdayLabels correctly switch by lang — verified (MON/TUE/… in en, 周一/周二/… in zh, RTL weekdays in ar).
useChat.js t('errorTryAgain') path not exercised live because /api/chat is 500; only string-level wiring verified.

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 — chat blocked by OpenRouter 402, not a code bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% for i18n scope (booking ru/en/zh/ar, payment-success en/zh/ar, RTL toggle) — zero console errors

seed_data_creation: None — test inserted a single chat_messages row with TEST_iter18_* session_id and cleaned up (never reached assertions due to chat 500).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 i18n fixes verified via DOM inspection on /booking and /payment-success across ru/en/zh/ar — all target keys render, no Russian leak, dir='rtl' for ar. A zh-block omission (errorTryAgain + bookingFailed) was found and patched. Backend blocker: OpenRouter out of credits → /api/chat 500; once restored, re-verify (a) greeting pre-cache uses selected lang, (b) useChat fallback bubble shows localized errorTryAgain, (c) useImageUpload error path. The TTS MSE postMessage frontend warning from iter17 is still present but non-blocking. Landing page uses hardcoded Russian for Miron's bio — App.css/landing is LOCKED per instructions.

features_tested.2_booking_legend_zh_en_ar: PASS (Available/Booked/Yours + hr + MON/TUE… or zh/ar equivalents — zero RU leak)
features_tested.4_rtl_for_arabic: PASS (document.documentElement.dir === 'rtl' when lang=ar; booking layout flips correctly)

rca_of_blocker: POST /api/chat returns {'detail':"Chat error: Error code: 402 - {'error': {'message': 'Insufficient credits. Add more using https://openrouter.ai/settings/credits', 'code': 402}}"}. Root cause: OPENROUTER_API_KEY account balance exhausted. Mitigation: (a) top up credits at openrouter.ai, or (b) swap to EMERGENT_LLM_KEY-backed provider for chat, or (c) rotate key. No code change required.
